brand_identity.name: LS Tech IA
brand_identity.mission: Empowering Brazilian enterprises with premium AI automation and cybersecurity.
brand_identity.target_audience: Brazilian companies and entrepreneurs seeking high-end tech solutions

design_philosophy.description: A deep, immersive dark void illuminated by precise, intelligent strands of neon light. The design should feel like peering into a supercomputer's brain—dark, cool, and pulsing with data.
rules: Dark Mode ONLY. No white backgrounds.
Glow is not decoration; it is hierarchy. Only important elements glow.
Glassmorphism must be 'Crystal' (high clarity, sharp edges), not 'Frosted' (muddy).
Motion should be fluid and 'heavy'—like liquid light, not bouncy.
Typography must be bold and geometric for headings.

gradients.hero_text: bg-clip-text text-transparent bg-gradient-to-r from-cyan-400 via-blue-500 to-purple-600

effects.particles: Canvas-based animated particles in background (blue/cyan nodes connected by lines)
effects.tracing_beam: Animated gradient border that travels around cards on hover

Header.style: Fixed, glassmorphism, z-50. Logo left, Nav center, CTA right.
Header.instructions: Must become more opaque on scroll. Links should have a 'glow' hover effect (text shadow).

Hero.style: Full height (min-h-screen). Center alignment. Big impact typography.

assets.overlay: Dark gradient overlay to ensure text readability

Hero.content: Badge: 'Nova Era da IA'. Headline: 'Inteligência Artificial que Redefine o Futuro'. CTA: 'Falar com Especialista'.

Services.card_style: Dark glass cards. Hover: Border lights up in neon cyan. Icon glows.

About.style: Asymmetric layout. Text left, futuristic visual right.

Contact.style: Clean, focused. Two main buttons (WhatsApp, Email) with large hit areas.

Footer.style: Minimalist. Logo, Links, Copyright. Darker background #02040a.

Chatbot.style: Floating button bottom-right. Pulsing glow effect. Expandable chat window.

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. Config: Update tailwind.config.js to include the custom colors (neon-cyan, deep-navy, etc.) in 'extend'.
3. Global CSS: Add the custom fonts (Outfit) via @import in index.css.
4. Component Architecture: Build small UI primitives first (Button, Card, Badge) then assemble sections.
5. Chatbot: Implement a mock UI for the chatbot first. The actual API integration can be mocked for the UI MVP.
6. Images: Use the provided URLs. Do not leave any src empty.
7. Particles: Use 'react-tsparticles' or a simple canvas script for the hero background dots/lines effect.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors: separates good from extraordinary.
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
